category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a queue service for memcache; official GitHub README describes MemcacheQ as a simple queue service over Memcache.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses “MemcacheQ - Simple Queue Service over Memcache”; source_facts.name is memcacheq.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the best available documentation surface; linked legacy memcachedb.org docs are historical/unavailable from the README.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/stvchu/memcacheq, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README lists queue operations over the memcache protocol and repository language is C; source_facts.executables lists memcacheq CLI/server binary.
